titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Pierson College, Yale University, Records of the Master
Pierson College, Yale University, Records of the Master
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday September 3, 2020 at 10:00

did.unittitle: Pierson College, Yale University, records of the master
did.abstract: The records consist of correspondence, budget materials, and subject files documenting student activities and accomplishments, scholarships, athletics, and student employment.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 13-J-2 (YRG 13-J-2), Records of the master of Pierson College.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the records is restricted. See Collection Contents for details.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Pierson College, Yale University, Records of the Master (RU 316). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of correspondence, budget materials, and subject files documenting student activities and accomplishments, scholarships, athletics, and student employment.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: The title "Master" for chief executive officers of residential colleges was changed to "Head of College" in April of 2016.

did.unittitle: Atheltics: Intercollege, Freshman Intramural, Graduate School
